title: Spicy Australian Shrimp Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy dish inspired by Australian cuisine, featuring succulent shrimp cooked to perfection on skewers.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Sweet Chili Sauce, Soy Sauce, and Brown Sugar.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each shrimp.
Brush the skewers with Vegetable Oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with Green Onion and additional Sweet Chili Sauce if desired.
